topics.title: Atomic Structure and Bonding
examination_focus: Ionic, covalent, dative and metallic bonds
Intermolecular forces (hydrogen bonding, van der Waals)
topics.typical_question_style: draw electron dot diagram for covalent compound

topics.title: Stoichiometry and Reaction Types
examination_focus: Mass and volume relationships in reactions
topics.typical_question_style: calculate mass of reactant needed for given product

topics.title: Gas Laws and Kinetic Theory
examination_focus: Boyle's, Charles', Pressure and Ideal Gas laws
topics.typical_question_style: calculate volume of gas at STP

topics.title: Energetics and Thermochemistry
topics.typical_question_style: calculate enthalpy change using Hess's law

topics.title: Reaction Rates and Equilibrium
examination_focus: Le Chatelier's principle and equilibrium constant
topics.typical_question_style: explain effect of temperature on equilibrium

topics.title: Electrochemistry
topics.typical_question_style: calculate mass of metal deposited during electrolysis

topics.title: Periodic Chemistry
examination_focus: Trends across periods and down groups
Groups 1 and 2: alkali and alkaline earth metals
Transition metals: colour, catalysis, complex formation
topics.typical_question_style: describe trends in reactivity of Group 1 elements

topics.title: Selected Compounds and Industrial Chemistry
examination_focus: Properties and uses of ammonia, sulphuric acid
topics.typical_question_style: describe extraction of aluminium from bauxite

topics.title: Hydrocarbons and Functional Groups
examination_focus: Alkenes: addition reactions, test for unsaturation

topics.title: Organic Derivatives and Polymers
examination_focus: Alkanals and alkanones: oxidation and test
topics.typical_question_style: describe test to distinguish between alkanal and alkanone
